title: Morning Coffee
content: Every morning, Daniel wakes up at 6:30. He walks slowly to the kitchen and makes a cup of coffee. The smell fills the apartment quickly. Daniel likes quiet mornings before work. He sits near the window and watches the street outside. Sometimes he reads the news on his phone. Sometimes he just enjoys the silence. After drinking his coffee, he takes a shower, gets dressed, and leaves for work with a small smile on his face.
